content:
🇨🇦 Canada's $250M Small Business Financing Expansion

💼 Provincial Allocation

  • • Ontario: $78M (manufacturing focus)
  • • Quebec: $56M (tech & innovation)
  • • British Columbia: $43M (export-oriented)
  • • Alberta: $34M (energy transition)
  • • Atlantic Canada: $39M (maritime & tourism)

📈 Financing Options

  • • Term loans: Up to $1M
  • • Equipment financing: Up to $500K
  • • Working capital: Up to $350K
  • • Export financing: Up to $750K
  • • Green technology: Up to $1.2M

The Government of Canada has significantly expanded its Small Business Financing Program with $250 million in new funding, designed to help Canadian entrepreneurs overcome the traditional barriers to accessing capital. This enhanced program offers more flexible terms, faster approvals, and specialized support for underserved markets across all provinces and territories.

🇨🇦 Access Canada's $250M Business Financing!

Join 2,800+ Canadian businesses that secured government financing

🍁 Get Your FREE Financing Assessment ($497 CAD Value)

⏰ Limited: 35 assessments for Canadian companies
